Package org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.definitions

package org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.definitions
These definitions provide standard interfaces for working with collections of standard metadata definitions that will be loaded into an archive or by a connector.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ActorDefinition
    Provides a definition of a pre-defined collection
    ActorRoleDefinition
    The ProductRoleDefinition is used to feed the definition of the actor roles for Coco Pharmaceuticals' product catalog.
    CollectionDefinition
    Provides a definition of a pre-defined collection
    DeployedImplementationTypeDefinition
    DeployedImplementationType describes the standard deployed implementation types supplied with Egeria.
    DesignModelDefinition
    A description of the predefined design models.
    GlossaryTermDefinition
    The GlossaryTermDefinition is used to populate the sustainability glossary.
    ReferenceableDefinition
    The ReferenceableDefinition is used to describe a predefined element that is a referencable.
    SolutionBlueprintDefinition
    A description of the predefined solution blueprints.
    SolutionComponentActorDefinition
    Define the relationship between the solution roles and the solution components
    SolutionComponentDefinition
    A description of the predefined solution components.
    SolutionComponentWireDefinition
    Define the linkage between solution components in a blueprint.
